name: of Cyzicus
Hypatius, Bishop of Gangra
kontakia: (Tone 2) See the strong and glorious choir of nine martyrs,* the men who professed the Trinity of triple glory.* As their trial began they exclaimed:* We offer You our bodies and souls as a sacrifice* poured out in our blood, O Master.* Since You are merciful, O Master, number us among the saints.

(Tone 2) We praise you as a brilliant star, O blessed Memnon.* You brighten the world by your virtue and miracles.* You approached the Unapproachable,* and so we praise the Savior as we keep your memory.
